title: Antimicrobial activity prediction against Acinetobacter baumannii from public ChEMBL data
description: Bioactivity prediction of growth inhibition in Acinetobacter baumannii, trained as binary (active/inactive) classifiers from publicly available data in ChEMBL. Independent models are trained on multiple bioactivity datasets, corresponding to single point (e.g. percent effect) and dose-response (MIC) assays. A ranking score is provided for each model alongside a combined consensus score.
